market_share.category: Layer-1 TVL share (LUNC vs all L1s tracked by DefiLlama)
Layer-1 market cap share (LUNC vs CoinGecko L1 category)

dev_ecosystem.monthly_active_devs: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — Electric Capital 2024 Developer Report lists Terra ecosystem but LUNC-specific monthly active dev count is not broken out in the free public summary; Terra (combined Classic+2.0) showed <50 monthly active devs in 2023 report
dev_ecosystem.full_time_devs: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — same report does not publish per-chain full-time counts in free tier; estimated <10 based on GitHub activity on terra-money/classic-core
dev_ecosystem.repos_building_on: NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER — Electric Capital free tier does not expose per-ecosystem repo counts for LUNC specifically

switching_cost_analysis: Switching costs are extremely low for LUNC users and developers because the chain uses standard Cosmos SDK / CosmWasm tooling that is directly portable to Terra 2.0, Osmosis, Injective, or any other IBC-compatible chain, and most surviving dApps have already migrated away post-collapse.
rationale: Terra Classic carries materially higher regulatory risk than most L1 peers because the original UST algorithmic stablecoin collapse triggered SEC enforcement action against Terraform Labs and Do Kwon (SEC v. Terraform Labs, 2023), creating lasting legal overhang on the ecosystem and its token. LUNC's TVL (~$18M) and developer activity are a fraction of top-tier L1s, giving it no meaningful competitive moat in throughput, tooling, liquidity, or brand trust. The community-driven burn mechanism and low token price attract speculative retail interest but do not constitute a durable structural advantage against Cosmos-ecosystem competitors or broader L1 alternatives.
sources: https://www.coingecko.com/en/categories/layer-1 — L1 category market caps for competitors
https://github.com/terra-money/classic-core — LUNC core repo, sparse recent commits observable publicly

https://electriccapital.com/developer-report — Electric Capital 2024 Developer Report (free public PDF); Terra ecosystem <50 monthly active devs noted in 2023 edition; 2024 update does not break out LUNC separately in free summary
https://station.terra.money — integration/dApp list; ~12 active integrations counted
https://www.sec.gov/litigation/complaints/2023/comp-pr2023-32.pdf — SEC complaint vs Terraform Labs (regulatory risk basis)
NOTE: Token Terminal free tier does NOT cover Terra Classic; DAU and revenue_30d marked NOT_AVAILABLE_FREE_TIER accordingly
